response.overview: Welcome to the one-of-a-kind time machine of VR Bangers, which will take you back to the 1960s inside our latest 8K UHD VR porn experience. The times of infinity opportunities, luxury resorts, and desperate housewives who'd do anything to seduce a wealthy gentleman. But what does all this have to do with one of our VR porn movies? You'll have to wear your VR goggles to find the answer to this question, so make it happen and let the fun begin! Meet the Desperate Housewives: Palm Royale, our new babe VR porn video that will make you rich! Inside it, you're about to take the position of an exceptionally prosperous young man who's just moved to Palm Springs and become a member of one of the most luxurious clubs in the world—Palm Royale! Joining one of such sumptuous societies has a lot of perks, including VIP services, privileges in many places, and some of the hottest female associates to share your benefits with.
response.title: Desperate Housewives: Palm Royale
